_note: Standard base plate and anchor bolt configurations per post type. Source: Rowena / Union Noise drawings + P105 T2 calculation report (Han Engineering, 8/6/2023).
_usage: Connection checks use these as starting configurations. If any UR >= 1.0, upsize to next configuration in the list.
_routing: Configs used only when config_id is explicitly passed. Dynamic derivation (_derive_connection) is used when config_id=None — iterates M16→M30 to find minimum-passing geometry. T1_M24_6bolt retained as P105 T2 validated reference.
_ds_note: T1_M24_6bolt: Ds=450mm explicit from PE calculation report page 10. Other configs: Ds derived as plate_height_mm/2 (unvalidated).

configurations._source_note: Standard reference configuration from Rowena drawings, April 2026. Not confirmed to match any specific PE report plate layout. Verify before submission.

bolts._Ds_note: Ds derived as plate_height/2 = 350/2 = 175mm. Unvalidated — pending PE drawing review.
bolts._bearing_note: e1=e2=50mm standard edge distance. p1=p2=2.4*d=48mm minimum spacing fallback.

configurations._source_note: Standard reference configuration from Rowena drawings, April 2026. Not confirmed to match any specific PE report plate layout. Verify before submission.

bolts._Ds_note: Ds derived as plate_height/2 = 530/2 = 265mm. Unvalidated — pending PE drawing review.
bolts._bearing_note: e1=e2=50mm standard edge distance. p1=p2=2.4*d=48mm minimum spacing fallback.

configurations._source_note: Confirmed from P105 T2 calculation report (Han Engineering, 8/6/2023) and drawing D-P105-TNCB-3002.
configurations._concrete_grade: C28/35 — fck=28 N/mm2 per P105 T2 material schedule. PE embedment check uses fck=25 (conservative).
configurations._pe_validation: All values confirmed from P105 T2 calculation report (Han Engineering, 8/6/2023). Ds=450mm explicitly stated on anchor bolt page (page 10). weld_length=1360mm from weld check page (page 5). n_clamps=5 from G clamp page (page 4).

bolts._Ds_note: Ds=450mm explicitly stated in PE calculation report page 10. Not derived from plate geometry.
bolts._bearing_note: e1=e2=50mm standard edge distance. p1=p2=125mm from bolt template 50|125|125|50 layout (D-P105-TNCB-3002).

configurations._layout_note: 3 columns x 2 rows. Bolt template shows 50|125|125|50 horizontally (cols at 50, 175, 300mm) and 50|500|50 vertically (rows at 50mm and 550mm). Confirmed from P105 T2 drawing D-P105-TNCB-3002.
configurations._weld_note: Weld length 1360mm from PE calculation report page 5. Formula 2b+2(h-2tf) gives 1045mm — underdetermines (likely excludes stiffener plate welds). Config value used directly.

stiffener_plate.note: 8mm THK stiffener plate — welds likely included in 1360mm PE weld length

configurations.source: Drawing D-P105-TNCB-3002 + P105 T2 calculation report (Han Engineering, 8/6/2023)
